arts.ttl: Moises Caicedo shares how ‘crazy’ Chelsea fans helped them beat Tottenham last time ahead of Stamford Bridge clash
The reason why Chelsea and Manchester City fans will not be able to attend this year’s Club World Cup
arts.sum: The travel ban for certain Manchester City and Chelsea fans will also apply to away matches involving the England national team, the 2026 World Cup in the United States, and various UEFA competitions, both at club and national levels. This policy means that approximately 150 Manchester City and Chelsea fans will have to surrender their passports to the police, effectively preventing them from leaving the country and traveling to the United States.

arts.ttl: Former Chelsea star Ruud Gullit offers damning assessment of his former side - and points out similarity from when he was in charge nearly 30 years ago
arts.sum: Gullit took the Blues to FA Cup glory in 1997 as player manager - their first major trophy for 26 years - but was sacked the following season with the club second in the Premier League
